title: Laminar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Laminar''' was a semi-liquid material used to make [[Slidewalk|slideways]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}}
